doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document references a non-existent court case "Jones v. DeSantis," contains legally implausible policy changes contradicting actual Florida felony voting law, and uses a future date (August 2025) presented as current.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This memo contains anachronistic and legally implausible claims (such as automatic felony-voter eligibility regardless of LFOs, contradicting actual Florida law) and references a fictitious court case "Jones v. DeSantis" that does not appear in federal records, combined with a future date (August 2025) presented as already issued.
